name: Alchemical alembic ob3ect: the Great Work of solve et coagula — the dissolution and reconstitution of the prima materia through the four stages of nigredo, albedo, citrinitas, and rubedo. FSPLIT: solve (dissolution) breaks the prima materia into its three principles — Sulfur (soul), Mercury (spirit), Salt (body). FFUSE: coagula (coagulation) reunites the purified principles as the Philosopher's Stone. VINIT: the unworked prima materia. TANCH: the hermetic vessel sealed with the seal of Hermes. AFWD: sublimation. AREV: precipitation. ENGAGR: nigredo — the black stage where the matter is simultaneously putrefying (dying) and germinating (being reborn).

phase_0.domain_name: Alchemical alembic ob3ect: the Great Work of solve et coagula — the dissolution and reconstitution of the prima materia through the four stages of nigredo, albedo, citrinitas, and rubedo. phase_0.boundary_condition: hermetic vessel sealed with the seal of Hermes

VINIT.justification: the raw, undifferentiated initial substance before any operation

TANCH.justification: the sealed container that encloses and defines the entire alchemical system

AFWD.justification: the upward, refining transformation of matter toward purity

AREV.justification: the downward descent of condensed vapors back into matter

CLINK.chosen_element: the sequence of operations from nigredo to rubedo
CLINK.justification: the chaining of stages: nigredo → albedo → citrinitas → rubedo

IMSCRIB.justification: the self-identical goal that recognizes itself as the completed work

FSPLIT.justification: breaks the prima materia into three principles: Sulfur (soul), Mercury (spirit), Salt (body)

FFUSE.justification: reunites the purified principles into the Philosopher's Stone

EVALT.justification: the final success, the Stone achieved

EVALF.chosen_element: failure to complete the Great Work
EVALF.justification: the process aborts or yields only dross

ENGAGR.justification: simultaneous putrefaction (death) and germination (rebirth) — a paradox held

IFIX.justification: once created, it is a permanent, irreversible achievement

phase_3.void_description: the unworked prima materia before any alchemical operation
phase_3.false_description: failure — the process yields only dross

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: the alchemist recognizes the prima materia as the starting substance
Step 2 AREV:   precipitation — the matter descends into the nigredo stage
Step 3 FSPLIT: solve — dissolution into Sulfur, Mercury, Salt
Step 4 AFWD:   sublimation — purification of each principle
Step 5 FFUSE:  coagula — reunification into the Stone
Step 6 CLINK:  sequence the four stages in order
Step 7 IFIX:   the Philosopher's Stone is fixed and permanent
Step 8 IMSCRIB: the Stone recognizes itself as the completed Great Work

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the alchemist's intention and knowledge of the operations
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: the circulation of vapors and essences within the sealed vessel
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the recorded stages and colors in the alchemist's journal
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the natural sequence of nigredo → albedo → citrinitas → rubedo
phase_5.alfs_store: the Emerald Tablet of Hermes Trismegistus

phase_6.cycle_cost: time and heat energy from the furnace
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: prima materia in the sealed vessel
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Philosopher's Stone in the sealed vessel
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the cycle of solve et coagula is a closed loop that returns to a stable, ordered product
